title: Home thread: description-input dialog + live self-titled label (web-ui)
prompt:
GOAL: Update the web-ui so creating a home (sidebar) chat thread asks for a DESCRIPTION instead of a name, and the thread label shows the title the thread's OWN agent sets (and updates) — see the linked backend task (agent self-titling via 'kanban home-thread set-title' + titleSource on the contract). Manual rename stays available and pins the title.

CONTEXT (read first):
- web-ui/src/components/home-agent/home-thread-create-dialog.tsx — currently a single-line 'name' input (placeholder 'e.g. Debugging') + agent picker.
- web-ui/src/hooks/use-home-threads.ts — createThread({ name, agentId }), DEFAULT_THREAD_NAME = 'Default', buildDefaultThread; calls runtime.createHomeThread.mutate.
- web-ui/src/components/home-agent/home-thread-bar.tsx (switcher / title rendering), home-thread-rename-dialog.tsx (keep manual rename).
- Follow AGENTS.md web-ui rules (Tailwind v4, Radix, lucide, surface tokens, src/components/ui primitives). Subscribe high-frequency slices in leaf components (memory 'perf10').

REQUIRED WORK:
1. Create dialog: replace the 'name' text input with a multi-line DESCRIPTION textarea (becomes the thread's kickoff prompt). Keep the agent picker. Submit sends 'description' to the updated createHomeThread contract; no manual title field. Placeholder like 'Describe what you want to work on…'.
2. Thread bar / switcher: render the thread title. Until the agent has set a real title, show the provisional state gracefully (the truncated description from the contract). Update live when the backend broadcasts the agent-set title (titleSource=auto). No client-side summarization — the title comes from the backend/agent.
3. Keep the manual rename dialog working; a manual rename sets titleSource=manual (pins it) per the backend contract.
4. Default thread keeps its existing 'Default' label and stays non-renamable/closable.

ACCEPTANCE:
- Adding a session = typing a description; a concise title appears shortly after (set by the thread's agent) and refreshes when the agent updates it.
- Manual rename still works and stops the auto-updates.
- web:typecheck + biome clean. No any types.
